caption: In a large, modern convention hall with grey flooring and tall walls, two men in business attire are seated and engaged in a conversation. One man wears a blue suit and tie, while the other wears a dark suit jacket over a light blue shirt. They sit at a round white table that holds a laptop and some papers. In the initial frames, the man in the blue suit is speaking and gesturing with his hands. As the sequence progresses, he settles into a listening posture while the second man begins to speak, gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. A graphic overlay at the bottom of the screen displays the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", and "From the Javits Center, New York, NY". The "theCUBE" logo and a "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo with the MongoDB leaf icon are also visible.
